title: bletilla japonica
intro: Bletilla japonica, also known as Japanese orchid or Chinese butterfly orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's extracts and preparations are believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Bletilla japonica is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or topical applications, although its use is mainly limited to traditional and folk medicine.
